payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall, narrow dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and beveled molding; shown in a vertical, edge-cropped view with the right edge cut off revealing a small gap/possible handle and slight surface scuffs and uneven finish; appears partial and close to the camera (approx. 1.5 m).
